summary.sosovalue: Community sentiment around SoSoValue on April 10-11, 2026, is predominantly positive, driven by promotional posts about Season 2 EXP airdrop positioning and links to join via referral codes, alongside numerous quotes and replies to the official SoSoValue Flash post on geopolitical tensions, AI sector rotation, and trade setups highlighting SoDEX assets like $USTECH-100, $XAUT, and $BTC. Key discussions revolve around market analysis, airdrop farming strategies, and appreciation for SoSoValue's data-driven insights amid US-Iran talks and economic headwinds, with users sharing screenshots of completed tasks and expressing excitement for potential rewards. Metrics show high engagement on official content (e.g., one flash post with 16,426 likes, 3,985 reposts, 12,649 quotes, 13,027 replies, 145,173 views), while independent posts garner modest likes (3-69) and views (54-1,229), indicating strong official reach but limited organic buzz excluding excluded accounts.
summary.sodex: Sentiment for Sodex is bullish and action-oriented, centered on Week 10 snapshot approaching on April 11 at 00:00 UTC, with users reminding others to close positions, hedge cycles, and maximize trading volume for SoPoints rewards, alongside complaints about gas fees and tips to optimize P&L. Discussions highlight winners of a $SOSO giveaway, referral boosts (e.g., 5% activity boost with codes like CJXPOIWS), and integration with SoSoValue ecosystem for trading spot/perps on ValueChain, positioning Sodex as user-aligned with low fees and transparency. Engagement metrics are moderate: posts with 2-33 likes, 0-2 reposts, up to 1,229 views, reflecting active farming community motivation ahead of snapshot rather than broad hype.
